{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"1","subject":"Implement session command stubs + flag expansion","description":"In an isolated worktree, implement all stubbed session commands and expand flags on existing ones in src/cmd/cmd.zig.

STUBBED COMMANDS TO IMPLEMENT:
- lock-client: send lock-command to target client, parse -t
- lock-server: lock all clients
- lock-session: lock all clients attached to target session, parse -t
- refresh-client: parse -c/-D/-L/-R/-S/-U/-A/-B/-C/-f/-l/-r/-t, implement resize (-C) at minimum
- show-messages: display server messages, parse -J/-T/-t
- suspend-client: send SIGTSTP to target client, parse -t
- switch-client: parse -E/-l/-n/-p/-r/-Z/-c/-t/-T

FLAG EXPANSION ON EXISTING:
- attach-session: add -d, -E, -r, -x, -c, -f
- detach-client: add -a, -P, -E, -s, -t
- kill-session: add -a, -C
- list-clients: add -F, -f, -t
- list-commands: add -F
- list-sessions: add -F, -f
- new-session: add -A, -d, -D, -E, -P, -X, -c, -e, -F, -f, -n, -t, -x, -y, shell-command
- rename-session: add -t

Also create src/cmd/session_commands_test.zig with tests for state transitions AND output format.

Reference: tmux(1) 3.5a man page. Pattern: follow existing cmdXxx handler style in cmd.zig.","assignedBy":"team-lead","timestamp":"2026-04-03T21:08:24.025Z"}
</teammate-message>
